     The Numbers Business Report

Carrie (2013)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $35,266,619Details
International Box Office $47,142,901
Worldwide Box Office $82,409,520
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,788,584
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,812,575
Total $7,601,159
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Carrie White is a shy girl outcast by her peers and sheltered by her deeply religious mother, who unleashes telekinetic terror on her small town after being pushed too far at her senior prom.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$16,101,552 (45.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.19 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:42.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,157 opening theaters/3,157 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $51,880,542

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 18th, 2013 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
Video Release: January 14th, 2014 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for bloody violence, disturbing images, language and some sexual content.
(Rating bulletin 2291, 9/25/2013)
Running Time: 99 minutes
Franchise: Carrie
Cast, crew, or production detail: Digital Cinematography, Epilogue, Prologue, Remake, Voiceover/Narration
Plot point: Bullies, Dysfunctional Family, High School Hell, Inspirational Teacher, Internet, Lacrosse, Prank Gone Wrong, Psychics, Religious, Revenge, Twins
Social setting: Prom, Supernatural
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer Pictures, Screen Gems, Misher Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
